positive: A whimsical and deeply contrasted illustration of a glowing forest creature sitting on a giant stylized mushroom. The creature has iridescent wings and a luminous mane, rendered in a clean, graphic vector art style with heavy outlines and limited color palette of cyan, violet, and emerald green. The composition is centered and vertical. The background is a stylized nocturnal woodland pattern (minimal leaves, geometric vines). The lighting is dramatic backlighting, emphasizing the creature's glow and sharp silhouette. Designed for seamless, impactful apparel print. High detail, poster quality, flat graphic design, concept art, ink wash style.
negative: blur, smudge, signature, text, watermark, logo, noisy, dirty, grain, low contrast, extra limbs, bad anatomy, photo, realistic, grainy, jpeg artifacts
